summary: Completed frontend testing of premium Agency and Hotel registration pages. Both pages feature split-screen design with Turkish content, multi-step forms, and mobile responsive layouts. All form steps, validation, and navigation working correctly.
passed_tests: Agency Registration: Split-screen layout with left hero pane and right form pane
Agency Registration: Turkish content - 'Türkiye'nin Lider B2B Turizm Ağına Katılın'
Agency Registration: Benefits section with 4 items (Anında Onaylı Rezervasyonlar, Özel B2B Komisyon Oranları, 7/24 VIP Acenta Desteği, Güvenli Ödeme Sistemi)
Agency Registration: Stats section (2,500+ Otel & Tesis, 500+ Aktif Acenta, ₺50M+ Aylık İşlem)
Agency Registration: 3-step form (Company Info, Contact Info, Location)
Agency Registration: Step 1 validation (name, tax_number required)
Agency Registration: Step 2 validation (contact_person, email, phone required)
Agency Registration: Step 3 with application summary
Agency Registration: Trust badges (256-bit SSL, TÜRSAB Üyesi, 24 Saat Onay)
Agency Registration: Mobile responsive design with mobile header
Hotel Registration: Split-screen layout with left hero pane and right form pane
Hotel Registration: Turkish content - 'Tesisinizi Milyonlarca Gezgine Açın'
Hotel Registration: Metrics section (+50% Doluluk Artışı, 100+ Ülke Erişimi, %0 Kayıt Ücreti)
Hotel Registration: Step labels on left pane (Temel Bilgiler, Konum & Açıklama, Özellikler, Fotoğraflar)
Hotel Registration: 4-step form (Basic Info, Location & Description, Amenities, Photos)
Hotel Registration: Step 1 - Property type dropdown with 8 Turkish options
Hotel Registration: Step 1 - Star rating selector (1-5 stars)
Hotel Registration: Step 2 - City dropdown with 20 Turkish cities
Hotel Registration: Step 2 - Description fields (English and Turkish)
Hotel Registration: Step 3 - 12 amenity options with icons
Hotel Registration: Step 3 - Check-in/Check-out time selectors
Hotel Registration: Step 4 - Photo upload area with drag & drop
Hotel Registration: Step 4 - Contact info section
Hotel Registration: Mobile responsive design with progress bar
Hotel Registration: Trust badges (Güvenli Platform, 24 Saat Onay, TÜRSAB Üyesi)

features: Property type and star rating selectors
Mobile responsive layout with progress bar

agency_registration.left_pane: Dark navy background with hero image overlay, Metro Travel logo, Turkish heading, benefits list, stats footer
agency_registration.right_pane: White background, form header, step indicators, form fields with icons, trust badges
agency_registration.mobile: Mobile header with logo and back button, form content only (no left pane)

hotel_registration.left_pane: Dark navy background with hotel image overlay, Metro Travel logo, Turkish heading, metrics cards, step labels
hotel_registration.right_pane: White background, step indicator, form header, form fields, trust message
hotel_registration.mobile: Mobile header with logo and back button, progress bar, form content only

context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium registration pages for Agency (/agency/register) and Hotel (/extranet/register) are fully functional. Both require authentication. Agency form has 3 steps, Hotel form has 4 steps. All Turkish content is properly displayed. Mobile responsive design working correctly.
